subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! Praise be to God that ye have found repose in the shelter of hope and have attained unto your destined goal [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی الحمد لله در سایه امید آرمیده اید و بسرمنزل مقصود رسیده و پرده
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @thankfulness; gratitude
